rule.name: Ignore snap disks because they are always at 100% of capacity
rule.description: Ignore snap disks because they are always at 100% of capacity
rule.query:
<if_sid>531</if_sid>
    <regex>'df -P':\s+/dev/loop\d+\s+\d+\s+\d+\s+0\s+100%\s+/snap/\w+/\d+</regex>
    <description>Ignore snap disks because they are always at 100% of capacity</description>
